• Docs:
    https://dashboard.clearbit.com/docs

    • 4. Apollo API

    Purpose: Business contacts, verified emails, company data

    • API Key:YOUR_APOLLO_API_KEY_HERE
    • Docs:
      https://apolloio.github.io/apollo-api-docs/

    5. Hunter.io API

    Purpose: Email lookup + verification

    • API Key:YOUR_HUNTER_API_KEY_HERE
    • Docs:
      https://hunter.io/api-documentation

    6. People Data Labs (PDL)

    Purpose: Company + people enrichment

    • API Key:YOUR_PDL_API_KEY_HERE
    • Docs:https://docs.peopledatalabs.com/docs

    7. FullContact API

    Purpose: Contact enrichment & business profiles

    • API Key:YOUR_FULLCONTACT_API_KEY_HERE
    • Docs:https://www.fullcontact.com/developer/docs/

    8. Crunchbase API

    Purpose: Company funding, financials, employees
context: From document: data enrichment strategy for ucc-mca intelligence platform — chunk 20 (chunk 20/32)
